headline: Meta, DoorDash Could Help Drive Stablecoins to $4 Trillion, Bitwise Investment Chief Says
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ:META), DoorDash Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH) and other large tech companies will drive stablecoins to a $4 trillion market and bring millions into the cryptocurrency space, Bitwise investment chief Matt Hougan says. Meta is testing stablecoin payments to creators...

headline: Lyft’s loyalty partnerships are driving customer acquisition and frequency
summary: More than one-quarter of Lyft’s rides in the first quarter of 2026 were connected to the rideshare company’s partnerships with other brands.

raw.headline: Lyft’s loyalty partnerships are driving customer acquisition and frequency

headline: DoorDash (DASH) Results Reinforced Market Share Gains
summary: Artisan Partners, an investment management company, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Artisan Mid Cap Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. In Q1 2026, the Artisan Mid Cap Fund reported negative absolute returns but slightly outperformed the Russell Midcap® Growth Index. The market favored lower volatility and income-oriented equities, […]

headline: Circle CEO on Q1 results: USDC accounts for about 80% of dollar digital currency transactions
summary: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the company's quarterly earnings results, state of stablecoin competition, and more.
